title: Smoky Persian Lamb Tagine
description: A hearty and aromatic North African-inspired stew made with tender lamb, smoky spices, and fresh herbs.
instructions: Heat oil in a large clay or ceramic pot over medium heat.
Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger; cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add lamb and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add smoky paprika, Persian dried lime, salt, and black pepper; stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook, stirring occasionally, until lamb is tender, about 1 1/2 hours.
Stir in parsley and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
